title: World Economic Outlook
summary:
Main
Weak freight rates across all segments, compounded by heightened uncertainty and seasonal factors, have further weighed on market sentiment and daily earnings. By Michalis Voutsinas
The Handysize segment stood out this week as the most resilient in the dry bulk market, being the only sector to avoid double-digit losses. The segment concluded the fourth trading week at $7,406 daily, down 9.25 percent week-on-week.
